intro_2.speaker: Crab
intro_2.text: I may look like a rock, but I promise I'm not.

choices.text: I must be dreaming right now...

morning_response.speaker: Crab
morning_response.text: Morning? I’ve seen thousands of them.

night_response.speaker: Crab
night_response.text: Night? The ocean glows at night.

intro_4.speaker: Crab
intro_4.text: While you're here... Could you help me with something?

intro_5.speaker: Crab
intro_5.text: I don't get the chance to talk to people very often.

empty.speaker: Crab
empty.text: No, don't listen. I want you to speak.
